title: Data archiving & compliance messaging
description: Secure, compliant messaging, archiving, and information governance for financial services — capture and analysis of email, instant messaging, social media, and voice. Lead SDET work on framework quality, strategy, hiring, and shift-left test design.

title: Smart grid & metering (BPL)
description: Smart metering and broadband-over-powerline communication for utilities. Led QA automation, team building, standards, client-facing acceptance testing, and delivery of a client-approved acceptance framework.

title: Customer engagement platform
description: Cloud customer intelligence platform for continuous feedback across the enterprise. Built cross-team UI automation, regression coverage, and API/mobile testing in a .NET / Selenium / SpecFlow / AWS stack.

title: OAuth 2.0 authorization & booking SOA
description: High-load REST authorization server (OAuth 2.0) securing HTTP communication across SOAP and REST services for an international booking platform. Framework work and API automation at scale.
